mapper.sql: facility_id AS facilityId, type_id AS typeId, name, description, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, open_time AS openTime, close_time AS closeTime, slot_duration AS slotDuration, is_active AS isActive, price, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT type_id, name, description, created_at FROM facility_type ORDER BY type_id ASC
SELECT type_id, name, description, created_at FROM facility_type WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility_type (name, description, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE facility_type SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT , COUNT(r.reservation_id) AS todayReserved FROM facility LEFT JOIN facility_type ON facility.type_id = facility_type.type_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON facility.facility_id = r.facility_id AND r.reservation_date = CURDATE() AND r.status != 'CANCELLED'
facility.deleted_at IS NULL
AND facility.type_id = #{_parameter}
GROUP BY facility.facility_id ORDER BY facility.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.facility_id = #{facilityId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.is_active = 1 AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.type_id, f.facility_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility ( type_id, name, description, max_capacity, open_time, close_time, slot_duration, is_active, price, created_at ) VALUES ( #{typeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{maxCapacity}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{active}, #{price}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE facility SET type_id = #{typeId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, slot_duration = #{slotDuration}, is_active = #{active}, price = #{price} WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE facility SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.name AS facilityName, ft.type_id AS typeId, ft.name AS typeName, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM facility f JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id

SELECT
FROM facility f WHERE f.is_active = 1 AND f.deleted_at IS NULL
